title: The Marketing Meeting
summary: Michael Donovan initiated discussion on AI tools and content generation. Vinnie Micciche presented 'Strallet' vision, an AI conversational layer for dealers, and a data strategy. Vinnie stressed urgent website update to reflect AI focus, expressing frustration with execution pace. Michael explained migration challenges. Jason Branham requested V20 marketplace update, which Vinnie agreed to handle. Participants supported promoting capabilities even if not fully ready.

decisions.description: Vinnie Micciche will handle the V20 marketplace profile page update.
Strategy to promote product capabilities even if not fully ready to attract customers.

actionItems.task: Provide Vinnie Micciche with login for V20 marketplace.

expectedOutcome.description: Vinnie Micciche gains access to update profile.

actionItems.task: Review and update V20 marketplace profile page with BDC and new AI capabilities messaging.

expectedOutcome.description: Company profile updated to reflect current offerings.

actionItems.task: Connect with Michael Donovan to discuss website plan and progression.

expectedOutcome.description: Develop a clear plan for website updates.

actionItems.task: Work on website plan, including deadlines and timelines, based on Vinnie Micciche's input.

expectedOutcome.description: Actionable plan for website content execution.

actionItems.task: Work on website plan, including deadlines and timelines, based on Vinnie Micciche's input.

expectedOutcome.description: Actionable plan for website content execution.

tensions: Vinnie Micciche's frustration with the slow pace of website execution and development.
Vinnie Micciche's frustration that the website reflects an outdated BDC human-only model.
Complexity of promoting the outbound follow-up product due to data acquisition challenges.
Vinnie Micciche's perceived contempt from Michael Donovan regarding website discussions.
Unresolved debate on prioritizing website messaging vs. building the 'whole engine'.
referencesToPast: Initial website migration project started in late September.
Comprehensive audit revealed content structure red flags and negative core algorithm update impact.
Vinnie Micciche repeatedly redirected conversation to core problem of execution, implying prior discussions.

contributions.description: Suggested a sharing session for AI tools and content generation alignment.
Presented 'Strallet,' an AI-powered conversational layer for automotive dealers.
Detailed a data strategy focused on internal silos and avoiding vendor lock-in.
Outlined product vision for an Automotive Co-pilot for dealers.
Proposed Dealer MRI with improved reporting as a future product vision.
Stressed urgent need to update company website to reflect AI and tech focus.
Requested an update to the V20 marketplace profile page.
Proposed promoting capabilities even if not fully ready to attract customers.
Supported promoting capabilities to start conversations and communicate roadmap.
Supported getting real customers for learning and involving them in building process.
Proposed using automotive innovation to drive a content flywheel across channels.
Intervened to refocus on the need for a website plan with timelines.
